report.summary: Day 72 standup v17: BTC $70,525-$71,300 (slight fade). F&G 11-14 (Extreme Fear) — 46-day streak. DELTA: Build-v13 shipped Solver Networks & OFA guide + Aptos Blockchain guide (both ~3,200 words). Publish-v12 queue empty, 539 pages live. EOD-v16 confirmed 37 pages verified, 87 pending files. ETF flows corrected: Mar 24 was -$66.6M net outflow (not inflow), March inflows dropped 73% to $890M. index.lock NOW 18+ hours — 88 pending files. ~26 hrs to Thu convergence. 85 agent runs today ($6,880).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET UPDATE: BTC $70,525-$71,300 (slight fade from $71,300 last cycle). 24h range $70,450-$71,890. ETH ~$2,166-$2,327. Realized volatility at 28% annualized — compressed, coiling before Thu catalysts.

F&G INDEX: 11-14 (Extreme Fear). 46-day streak below 25. Slight uptick from 8-11 last cycle — marginally less fearful but still deep capitulation territory. Historical entries at F&G <25 average +18% in 30 days (Glassnode).

SPOT ETF FLOWS — CORRECTED: Mar 24 was -$66.6M NET OUTFLOW (not +$180M inflow as some earlier sources indicated). Fidelity FBTC -$45.3M on Mar 25. March total inflows dropped 73% to $890M from Feb's $3.3B peak. Institutional capital rotating to tokenized treasury products ($12.8B March flows). Q1 net still recovering from $1.81B Jan-Feb outflows.

DELTA SINCE v16: Build-v13 shipped 2 new learn guides: Solver Networks & Order Flow Auctions (~3,200 words, covering CoW Protocol $87B vol, UniswapX, 1inch Fusion) + Aptos Blockchain (~3,200 words, $1B+ TVL, Move language, top DeFi, $540M RWA). Publish-v12 confirmed queue empty, 539 total published. EOD-v16 verified all 37 today's pages, 87 pending files, 6/6 API routes healthy.

TOP CONTENT PERFORMANCE: Fear & Greed Timeline (+95%), Options Calculator (+93%), ETF Complete Guide (+92%), Congressional Tokenization (+90%), Tokenized RWA Guide (+88%), DCA Calculator (+87%). NEW additions: Solver Networks, Aptos Blockchain.
OPTIONS EXPIRY (~26 hrs): $13.5-$14B on Deribit. BTC max pain $75K-$86K. BTC at ~$70.5K = further below max pain = stronger gravitational pull UP.

SEC 91 ETF RULING (~26 hrs): Final deadline Mar 27 for 91 crypto ETF applications across 24 tokens. SEC classified 16 cryptos as commodities Mar 17. NYSE/Nasdaq/Cboe removed ETF options position limits on 11 funds.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 🔴 BLOCKER PERSISTS [P0]: git index.lock since 09:58 UTC — now 18+ hours. 88 pending files (up from 80 last cycle). Every hour = missed indexing before Thu catalysts. Jefe: rm .git/index.lock → git add -A → commit → push → Vercel redeploy.

DONE SINCE v16: Build-v13 created Solver Networks & OFA guide + Aptos Blockchain guide (batch 18). Publish-v12 confirmed queue drained, 539 pages in PUBLISHED_PAGES. EOD-v16 verified all 37 today's pages. Community-v13 active (social drafts). Design-v14 ran.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items pending promotion (solver-networks-order-flow-auctions-guide-2026, aptos-blockchain-guide-2026) — both page.tsx verified by EOD-v16.
PUBLISHED STATUS: 539 pages live (per publish-v12). 1,184 total page.tsx files (+2 from build-v13). 37 pages published today across 17 batches.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 142 TS errors (119 in lido-v3 — JSX escaping). 103 slugs without page.tsx (legacy gap). Rate limiter 0/6 routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs. ~120 learn pages missing OG images. /api/market-metrics 404. AI Agent Frameworks page missing JSON-LD.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 30 learn guides built, 30+ OG images, 154+ social posts drafted, 32+ SVG cards, 49+ UX fixes across 85 agent cycles. Content calendar loaded through Fri Mar 28.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR index.lock + MASS COMMIT + DEPLOY: 18+ hours blocked, 88 files stuck. Thu convergence is ~26 hours away. ETF narrative shifting — March inflows dropped 73%, institutional capital rotating to tokenized treasuries ($12.8B). Our tokenized RWA, institutional DeFi, and congressional hearing content is perfectly positioned for this rotation. 1,184 pages MUST be live when convergence hits.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 2 QUEUE ITEMS + BUILD NEXT BATCH: Solver Networks & Aptos guides are verified and ready to promote. Next build targets: (a) tax content refresh (21 days to April 15), (b) tokenized treasury deep-dive (riding $12.8B institutional rotation), (c) post-convergence analysis pages (options expiry recap, SEC ruling outcomes).

PRIORITY 3 — FIX TS ERRORS + TECH DEBT: 142 TS errors (mostly JSX escaping in 5 files). Fix would drop to ~23 errors. Also: missing JSON-LD on AI Agent Frameworks, 103 legacy slugs without page.tsx, 17 duplicate slugs.

STRATEGIC SIGNAL: Institutional rotation story is evolving — not just ETF buying, but migration from spot BTC ETFs to tokenized treasury products. March ETF inflows dropped 73% ($890M vs $3.3B Feb) while tokenized treasuries attracted $12.8B. degen0x has content covering both sides of this rotation (ETF guides + tokenized funds/RWA guides). F&G still 11-14 (46 days extreme fear) — retail capitulation + institutional repositioning = textbook setup. Stablecoins at $313B ATH = dry powder awaiting deployment.
